title: Daewoo Hand Held Blender Set With Whisk, Chopper And Jug, Turbo Boost, 2 Speed Controls, Stainless Steel Blades
features: BLEND WHIP & CHOP - With blending, whisking and chopping attachments included as well as a jug, it is easy to prepare a variety of juices, drinks or sauces
2 SPEED TOUCH CONTROL - Easy to select 2 touch speed switch is right at your fingertips meaning you can blend or chop your ingredients to just the right consistency
DURABLE STAINLESS STEEL - Complete with a stainless steel shaft at the heart of this blender the unit also features a rust proof stainless steel cutting blade
EASY TO CLEAN - All the attachments can be removed easily from the hand blender for cleaning and with a stainless steel shaft the blender can be wiped clean quickly and easily
description: From the manufacturer Features 220-240V AC 50/60Hz 700W Power 2 Speed Settings Whisk and Chopper Attachments About Daewoo Our Daewoo Electricals range offers quality, innovative and affordable products in areas such as small domestic appliances, heaters, fans, audio products and much more. Daewoo 700W Black and Silver Hand Blender Set with Whisk Chopper & Jug Accessories With blending, whisking and chopping attachments included as well as a jug, it is easy to prepare a variety of juices, drinks or sauces. Two Speed Settings Easy to select 2 touch speed switch is right at your fingertips meaning you can blend or chop your ingredients to just the right consistency 3 Year Full Coverage Simply register your purchase on our Daewoo Electricals website for full coverage. Use the low speed for small amounts and the turbo speed for large amounts and harder ingredients. All the attachments can be removed easily from the hand blender for cleaning. Complete with a stainless steel shaft at the heart of this blender the unit also features a rust proof stainless steel cutting blade. Equipped with a powerful energy saving 700W motor this hand blender makes light work of many ingredients.
